attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 PRS.LEAF_TERR_ID   , 
 PRS.LEAF_TERR_NAME ,  
 PRS.RANK_LEVEL1    ,
 PRS.RANK_LEVEL2    ,
 PRS.RANK_LEVEL3    ,
 PRS.RANK_LEVEL4    ,
 PRS.RANK_LEVEL5    ,
 PRS.RANK_LEVEL6    ,
 PRS.RANK_LEVEL7    ,
 PRS.RANK_LEVEL8    ,
 PRS.RANK_LEVEL9    ,
 PRS.RANK_LEVEL10   ,
 PRS.RANK_LEVEL11   ,
 PRS.RANK_LEVEL12   ,
 PRS.ABSOLUTE_RANK  ,
 PRS.SPLIT, 
 PRS.PR_SALES_REP_NUMBER      ,
 PRS.PR_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
 PRS.POSTAL_CD_MAX_RANGE , 
 PRS.SHARE_SHORT_CTRY_CD ,
 PRS.SHARE_COUNTRY_CD  ,
 PRS.PGTMV_GEO_ID           , 
 PRS.END_SHIP_TO_CONTRY_ID , 
 PRS.END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_RANGE ,
 PRS.END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_LOV , 
 PRS.END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_INIT , 
 PRS.DV_END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_INIT , 
 PRS.END_SHIP_TO_STATE ,
 PRS.DISTRIBUTOR_ID ,
 PRS.END_SHIP_TO_CITY_ID , 
 PRS.END_SOLD_TO_COUNTRY_ID , 
 PRS.PGTMV_PARTNER_BE_ID,
 PRS.PROCESS_TYPE,
PRS.YEAR_FLG_INT
FROM 
( 
SELECT 
 DISTINCT 
 PR.LEAF_TERR_ID   , 
 PR.LEAF_TERR_NAME ,  
 PR.RANK_LEVEL1    ,
 PR.RANK_LEVEL2    ,
 PR.RANK_LEVEL3    ,
 PR.RANK_LEVEL4    ,
 PR.RANK_LEVEL5    ,
 PR.RANK_LEVEL6    ,
 PR.RANK_LEVEL7    ,
 PR.RANK_LEVEL8    ,
 PR.RANK_LEVEL9    ,
 PR.RANK_LEVEL10   ,
 PR.RANK_LEVEL11   ,
 PR.RANK_LEVEL12   ,
 PR.ABSOLUTE_RANK  ,
 PR.SPLIT, 
 PR.SALES_AGENT_NUMBER AS PR_SALES_REP_NUMBER      ,
 COALESCE(RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) AS PR_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
 POSTAL_CD_RANGE.ATTRIBUTE3 AS POSTAL_CD_MAX_RANGE , 
 CASE 
 WHEN COALESCE(SHARE_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE , 'UN') = 'UN' 
  THEN RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME
 ELSE ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 END AS SHARE_SHORT_CTRY_CD ,
 RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE AS SHARE_COUNTRY_CD  ,
 PGTMV.LOV_VALUE AS PGTMV_GEO_ID           , 
 END_USR_SHIP_TO_CNTRY.QUALIFIER_VALUE AS END_SHIP_TO_CONTRY_ID , 
 POSTAL_CD_RANGE.LOV_VALUE AS END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_RANGE ,
 POSTAL_CD_LOV.LOV_VALUE AS END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_LOV , 
 POSTAL_CD_INITIAL.LOV_VALUE AS END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_INIT , 
 POSTAL_CD_INITIAL.LOV_VALUE||'%' AS DV_END_SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CD_INIT , 
 SHIP_TO_STATE_LOV.LOV_VALUE AS  END_SHIP_TO_STATE ,
 DISTRIBUTOR.LOV_VALUE AS DISTRIBUTOR_ID ,
 END_SHIP_TO_CITY.LOV_VALUE AS END_SHIP_TO_CITY_ID , 
 END_SOLD_TO_COUNTRY.QUALIFIER_VALUE AS END_SOLD_TO_COUNTRY_ID , 
 PGTMV_BE_ID_LOV.LOV_VALUE AS PGTMV_PARTNER_BE_ID,
 CONTROL.PROCESS_TYPE,
 CONTROL.YEAR_FLG_INT
FROM 
(
SELECT 
DISTINCT LEAF_TERR_ID,LEAF_TERR_NAME,RANK_LEVEL1     ,
 RANK_LEVEL2                    ,
 RANK_LEVEL3                    ,
 RANK_LEVEL4                    ,
 RANK_LEVEL5                    ,
 RANK_LEVEL6                    ,
 RANK_LEVEL7                    ,
 RANK_LEVEL8                    ,
 RANK_LEVEL9                    ,
 RANK_LEVEL10                   ,
 RANK_LEVEL11                   ,
 RANK_LEVEL12                   ,
 ABSOLUTE_RANK     , 
 SPLIT                         , 
 SALES_AGENT_NUMBER ,
 NODE_ID
FROM $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_RULES 
) PR
CROSS JOIN (SELECT PROCESS_TYPE,YEAR_FLG_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.WI_DRR_PROCESS_CONTROL WHERE ACTIVE_FLAG='Y' AND PROCESS_TYPE = $$PROCESS_TYPE) CONTROL
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT PR.LEAF_TERR_ID, LOV.LOV_VALUE FROM $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_RULES PR 
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_LOV_DETAILS LOV 
ON PR.QUALIFIER_VALUE = LOV.LOV_NAME
AND LEAF_TERR_NAME = OTM_TERRITORY_NAME
WHERE QUALIFIER_NAME=  'PGTMV Partner Geo ID LOV (Cisco)'  
) PGTMV
ON PR.LEAF_TERR_ID=PGTMV.LEAF_TERR_ID
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT LEAF_TERR_ID,PR.QUALIFIER_VALUE FROM $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_RULES PR 
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_LOV_DETAILS LOV 
ON PR.QUALIFIER_VALUE = LOV.LOV_NAME
AND LEAF_TERR_NAME = OTM_TERRITORY_NAME
WHERE PR.QUALIFIER_NAME = 'END USER / Ship TO Country (Cisco)'  
) END_USR_SHIP_TO_CNTRY
ON PR.LEAF_TERR_ID = END_USR_SHIP_TO_CNTRY.LEAF_TERR_ID
LEFT JOIN
( SELECT PR.LEAF_TERR_ID, LOV.LOV_VALUE , LOV.ATTRIBUTE3 FROM $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_RULES PR 
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_LOV_DETAILS LOV 
ON PR.QUALIFIER_VALUE = LOV.LOV_NAME
AND LEAF_TERR_NAME = OTM_TERRITORY_NAME
WHERE QUALIFIER_NAME = 'END USER/ Ship TO Postal Code RANGE  LOV (Cisco)'  
) POSTAL_CD_RANGE
ON PR.LEAF_TERR_ID=POSTAL_CD_RANGE.LEAF_TERR_ID
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT PR.LEAF_TERR_ID, LOV.LOV_VALUE FROM $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_RULES PR 
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_LOV_DETAILS LOV 
ON PR.QUALIFIER_VALUE = LOV.LOV_NAME
AND LEAF_TERR_NAME = OTM_TERRITORY_NAME
WHERE QUALIFIER_NAME=  'END USER/ Ship TO Postal Code  LOV (Cisco)'  
) POSTAL_CD_LOV
ON PR.LEAF_TERR_ID=POSTAL_CD_LOV.LEAF_TERR_ID
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT PR.LEAF_TERR_ID, LOV.LOV_VALUE FROM $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_RULES PR 
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_LOV_DETAILS LOV 
ON PR.QUALIFIER_VALUE = LOV.LOV_NAME
AND LEAF_TERR_NAME = OTM_TERRITORY_NAME
WHERE QUALIFIER_NAME=  'END USER / Ship TO Postal Code Initial LOV (Cisco)'  
) POSTAL_CD_INITIAL
ON PR.LEAF_TERR_ID=POSTAL_CD_INITIAL.LEAF_TERR_ID
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT PR.LEAF_TERR_ID, LOV.LOV_VALUE FROM $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_RULES PR 
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_LOV_DETAILS LOV 
ON PR.QUALIFIER_VALUE = LOV.LOV_NAME
AND LEAF_TERR_NAME = OTM_TERRITORY_NAME
WHERE QUALIFIER_NAME = 'END USER/Ship TO State LOV (Cisco)'  
) SHIP_TO_STATE_LOV
ON PR.LEAF_TERR_ID=SHIP_TO_STATE_LOV.LEAF_TERR_ID
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT PR.LEAF_TERR_ID, LOV.LOV_VALUE FROM $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_RULES PR 
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_LOV_DETAILS LOV 
ON PR.QUALIFIER_VALUE = LOV.LOV_NAME
AND LEAF_TERR_NAME = OTM_TERRITORY_NAME
WHERE QUALIFIER_NAME = 'Distributor Id LOV (Cisco)'  
) DISTRIBUTOR
ON PR.LEAF_TERR_ID = DISTRIBUTOR.LEAF_TERR_ID
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT PR.LEAF_TERR_ID, LOV.LOV_VALUE FROM $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_RULES PR 
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_LOV_DETAILS LOV 
ON PR.QUALIFIER_VALUE = LOV.LOV_NAME
AND LEAF_TERR_NAME = OTM_TERRITORY_NAME
WHERE QUALIFIER_NAME=  'End User / Ship To City LOV (Cisco)'  
) END_SHIP_TO_CITY
ON PR.LEAF_TERR_ID = END_SHIP_TO_CITY.LEAF_TERR_ID
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT LEAF_TERR_ID,PR.QUALIFIER_VALUE 
 FROM $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_RULES PR 
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_LOV_DETAILS LOV 
ON PR.QUALIFIER_VALUE = LOV.LOV_NAME
AND LEAF_TERR_NAME = OTM_TERRITORY_NAME
WHERE QUALIFIER_NAME = 'End User / Reseller Country (Cisco)'  
) END_SOLD_TO_COUNTRY
ON PR.LEAF_TERR_ID = END_SOLD_TO_COUNTRY.LEAF_TERR_ID
LEFT JOIN
(
SELECT PR.LEAF_TERR_ID, LOV.LOV_VALUE FROM $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_RULES PR 
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.$$ST_DRR_PL_LOV_DETAILS LOV 
ON PR.QUALIFIER_VALUE = LOV.LOV_NAME
AND LEAF_TERR_NAME = OTM_TERRITORY_NAME
WHERE QUALIFIER_NAME = 'PGTMV Partner BE ID LOV (Cisco)'  
) PGTMV_BE_ID_LOV
ON PR.LEAF_TERR_ID = PGTMV_BE_ID_LOV.LEAF_TERR_ID 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.$$R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH
ON PR.NODE_ID= RSH.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT 
AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY SHARE_CTRY
ON SHARE_CTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
) PRS 
WHERE PRS.SPLIT IS NOT NULL
